title: GitHub - nmdra/notebrain-cli: A local-first CLI that makes your Obsidian vault searchable and AI- Agents queryable with semantic search and hidden connections. 100% local, no servers.
excerpt: A local-first CLI that makes your Obsidian vault searchable and AI- Agents queryable with semantic search and hidden connections. 100% local, no servers. - nmdra/notebrain-cli
content_html:
A Go CLI tool that turns your Obsidian vault into a fully offline knowledge backend for AI coding agents. NoteBrain indexes markdown notes into a local ChromaDB vector database and exposes semantic search, wikilink graph traversal, and hidden connection discovery through structured output — designed to be chained directly by autonomous agents, shell pipelines, and LLM tool-use workflows.

Ships with an AI agent skill and OpenCode Agent Configuration for integration with autonomous coding agents like OpenCode, Google Antigravity, Pi agent, and Claude Code. This setup is specially optimized to reduce token usage and latency.

Note

Hi, I'm Nimendra.
I use Obsidian daily as my primary note-taking solution. When AI agents emerged, I wanted to use my Obsidian vault as an RAG system.But most existing solutions don't fulfill my requirements.
While researching, I came across this article, which inspired this project.So I built this for my personal use. While you can use it directly, I highly encourage you to fork and modify this solution for your own use case.

I don't use Windows or macOS, so those versions aren't shipped directly, but you can compile the binary using the source code.

Features

  • Semantic Search — Find notes by meaning, not just keywords, using the offline all-MiniLM-L6-v2 ONNX embedding model.
  • Multi-Query Search — Search with multiple independent queries to improve retrieval for complex topics and AI agent workflows.
  • Knowledge Graph Traversal — Explore your Obsidian wikilink graph through backlinks, multi-hop connections, and shared tag relationships.
  • Hidden Connections — Discover semantically related notes that aren't explicitly linked, with optional deep section-level analysis.
  • Graph-Boosted Ranking — Improve search relevance by combining semantic similarity with graph relationships.
  • Interactive Terminal UI — Browse results with a fuzzy-search interface, plus intelligent guidance when searches return no matches.
  • Advanced Filtering — Refine results by sections, tags, code blocks, tasks, and other note metadata.
  • Full Note Retrieval — Reconstruct complete notes on demand from indexed content.
  • Structured Output — Export results as JSON or TSV, with built-in JSONPath querying for easy automation.
  • AI Agent Integration — Includes a built-in AI agent skill and dedicated for autonomous knowledge retrieval.
  • Terminal Hyperlinks — Open notes directly from supported terminals using OSC 8 hyperlinks.
  • Editor Integration — Open search results instantly in your preferred editor or directly in Obsidian.
  • Obsidian-Aware Indexing — Respects your Obsidian configuration, including ignored files, attachment folders, and optional exclusion of empty-note references.

Note: Currently, this tool focuses on Markdown text only and does not support PDF or image OCR.

Under the Hood

  • Goldmark AST-Aware Chunking — Splits markdown by header hierarchy rather than arbitrary character offsets, strictly preserving lists, GFM tables, blockquotes/callouts, and code blocks.
  • Embedded ChromaDB — Stores vectors directly on disk via chroma-go.
  • Incremental Ingestion — SHA-256 content hashing skips unmodified notes in milliseconds on re-runs.

See the Architecture guide for more details.

Prerequisites

  • Go 1.26.4+
  • CGO-enabled toolchain
  • Linux (macOS and Windows binaries are untested)

Installation

Download a pre-built binary from the GitHub Releases page, or build from source:

git clone https://github.com/nmdra/notebrain-cli.git
cd notebrain-cli
make build          # CGO_ENABLED=1 go build -o notebrain .
sudo mv notebrain /usr/local/bin/

See the full Installation Guide for details.

Quick Start

1. Index your vault:

notebrain ingest --vault-path "/path/to/your/Obsidian Vault"

Note: First-time indexing may take several minutes depending on your vault size.

2. Search your notes by meaning:

notebrain search "how do message brokers work?" --limit 5 --top-k 2

3. Discover deep hidden connections across note sections:

Find notes that share similar concepts without direct wikilinks, using --deep chunk-by-chunk section matching (§ <Heading>):

notebrain hidden "TLS" --deep

4. Get structured output for scripts and AI agents:

notebrain search "how do message brokers work?" --limit 2 --top-k 1 --format=json | jq
Example JSON output

5. Chain commands to retrieve full notes:

# Extract slug from top search result
SLUG=$(notebrain search "message broker" --limit 1 --jsonpath="$.results[0].note_slug")

# Retrieve complete reconstructed note text
notebrain get "$SLUG" --jsonpath="$.text"

6. Automate indexing with a cron job or systemd timer so your index stays fresh (see Scheduled Ingestion).

7. Integration with AI Agents

Use the built-in AI agent skill and OpenCode Agent Configuration for knowledge retrieval.

Tip

I highly recommend using the Pi Agent with the provided skill. It delivers higher-quality results, even with low cost models such as DeepSeek Flash, without consuming unnecessary tokens. It also improves cache hit rates, helping reduce overall costs.

For LLM models, use the default or medium thinking mode for fast responses.

Configuration

NoteBrain reads configuration from a TOML file at ~/.notebrain/config/config.toml (or pass --config=/path/to/config.toml). CLI flags always override TOML values.

Copy the template to get started:

mkdir -p ~/.notebrain/config
cp config.example.toml ~/.notebrain/config/config.toml

Key settings (full reference):

vault-path = "/path/to/Second-Brain"
vault-name = "Second-Brain"
format     = "text"              # "text", "json", "tsv", "ndjson"

skip-attachments = true          # ignore image/file links in graph
skip-phantom     = true          # exclude uncreated "phantom" notes
respect-exclude  = true          # honor Obsidian's ignore rules

Data Location

All persistent data is stored under ~/.notebrain/:

Path Contents
~/.notebrain/chroma/ ChromaDB vector store (embeddings, metadata, link graph)
~/.notebrain/config/config.toml User configuration file

To fully uninstall, remove the notebrain binary and delete ~/.notebrain/.

Documentation

Guide Description
Installation Prerequisites, pre-built binaries, building from source
Commands Reference Full CLI command and flag documentation
Architecture Internals: chunking pipeline, embedding, ChromaDB schema
Scheduled Ingestion Cron and systemd timer setup for background indexing
AI Agent Skill Usage Using the built-in AI agent skill for autonomous retrieval
OpenCode Agent Integration Configuring NoteBrain as an OpenCode AI coding assistant
DeepWiki AI-generated codebase documentation

Contributing

Contributions are welcome! Please open an issue or pull request on GitHub.

This project uses Conventional Commits, Go vendoring (vendor/), and pre-commit hooks via Lefthook.

License

MIT License — Copyright © 2026 nmdra

blocks.html_en: • Semantic Search — Find notes by meaning, not just keywords, using the offline all-MiniLM-L6-v2 ONNX embedding model.

blocks.html_en: • Knowledge Graph Traversal — Explore your Obsidian wikilink graph through backlinks, multi-hop connections, and shared tag relationships.

sentences.en: Knowledge Graph Traversal — Explore your Obsidian wikilink graph through backlinks, multi-hop connections, and shared tag relationships.

blocks.html_en: • Hidden Connections — Discover semantically related notes that aren't explicitly linked, with optional deep section-level analysis.

sentences.en: Hidden Connections — Discover semantically related notes that aren't explicitly linked, with optional deep section-level analysis.
sentences.zh: 隐藏连接 — 通过可选的深度章节级分析，发现未显式链接的语义相关注释。

blocks.html_en: • Graph-Boosted Ranking — Improve search relevance by combining semantic similarity with graph relationships.

sentences.en: Graph-Boosted Ranking — Improve search relevance by combining semantic similarity with graph relationships.
sentences.zh: 图提升排名——通过将语义相似性与图关系相结合来提高搜索相关性。

blocks.html_en: • Interactive Terminal UI — Browse results with a fuzzy-search interface, plus intelligent guidance when searches return no matches.

sentences.en: Interactive Terminal UI — Browse results with a fuzzy-search interface, plus intelligent guidance when searches return no matches.
sentences.zh: 交互式终端 UI — 使用模糊搜索界面浏览结果，并在搜索未返回匹配项时提供智能指导。

blocks.html_en: • Advanced Filtering — Refine results by sections, tags, code blocks, tasks, and other note metadata.

sentences.en: Advanced Filtering — Refine results by sections, tags, code blocks, tasks, and other note metadata.
sentences.zh: 高级过滤 - 按部分、标签、代码块、任务和其他注释元数据优化结果。

blocks.html_en: • Full Note Retrieval — Reconstruct complete notes on demand from indexed content.

sentences.en: Full Note Retrieval — Reconstruct complete notes on demand from indexed content.
sentences.zh: 完整笔记检索——根据索引内容按需重建完整笔记。

blocks.html_en: • Structured Output — Export results as JSON or TSV, with built-in JSONPath querying for easy automation.

sentences.en: Structured Output — Export results as JSON or TSV, with built-in JSONPath querying for easy automation.
sentences.zh: 结构化输出 - 将结果导出为 JSON 或 TSV，并使用内置 JSONPath 查询轻松实现自动化。

blocks.html_en: • AI Agent Integration — Includes a built-in AI agent skill and dedicated for autonomous knowledge retrieval.

sentences.en: AI Agent Integration — Includes a built-in AI agent skill and dedicated for autonomous knowledge retrieval.
sentences.zh: AI 代理集成 — 包括内置的 AI 代理技能，专用于自主知识检索。

blocks.html_en: • Terminal Hyperlinks — Open notes directly from supported terminals using OSC 8 hyperlinks.

sentences.en: Terminal Hyperlinks — Open notes directly from supported terminals using OSC 8 hyperlinks.
sentences.zh: 终端超链接 — 使用 OSC 8 超链接直接从支持的终端打开笔记。

blocks.html_en: • Editor Integration — Open search results instantly in your preferred editor or directly in Obsidian.

sentences.en: Editor Integration — Open search results instantly in your preferred editor or directly in Obsidian.
sentences.zh: 编辑器集成 - 在您喜欢的编辑器中或直接在 Obsidian 中立即打开搜索结果。

blocks.html_en: • Obsidian-Aware Indexing — Respects your Obsidian configuration, including ignored files, attachment folders, and optional exclusion of empty-note references.

sentences.en: Obsidian-Aware Indexing — Respects your Obsidian configuration, including ignored files, attachment folders, and optional exclusion of empty-note references.
sentences.zh: 黑曜石感知索引 - 尊重您的黑曜石配置，包括忽略的文件、附件文件夹以及可选的空注释引用排除。

blocks.html_en: Note: Currently, this tool focuses on Markdown text only and does not support PDF or image OCR.

sentences.en: Note: Currently, this tool focuses on Markdown text only and does not support PDF or image OCR.

blocks.html_en: 7. Integration with AI Agents

sentences.en: Integration with AI Agents
sentences.zh: 与人工智能代理集成

blocks.html_en: Use the built-in AI agent skill and OpenCode Agent Configuration for knowledge retrieval.

blocks.html_en: Tip

I highly recommend using the Pi Agent with the provided skill. It delivers higher-quality results, even with low cost models such as DeepSeek Flash, without consuming unnecessary tokens. It also improves cache hit rates, helping reduce overall costs.

sentences.en: I highly recommend using the Pi Agent with the provided skill.
sentences.zh: 我强烈建议使用具有所提供技能的 Pi Agent。

sentences.en: It delivers higher-quality results, even with low cost models such as DeepSeek Flash, without consuming unnecessary tokens.
sentences.zh: 即使使用 DeepSeek Flash 等低成本模型，它也能提供更高质量的结果，而不会消耗不必要的代币。

sentences.en: It also improves cache hit rates, helping reduce overall costs.
sentences.zh: 它还提高了缓存命中率，有助于降低总体成本。

blocks.html_en: For LLM models, use the default or medium thinking mode for fast responses.

sentences.en: For LLM models, use the default or medium thinking mode for fast responses.
sentences.zh: 对于LLM模型，使用默认或中等思维模式以获得快速响应。

content_html_zh:
一个 Go CLI 工具，可将您的 ObsidianVault 转变为 AI 编码代理的完全离线知识后端。 NoteBrain 将 Markdown 笔记索引到本地 ChromaDB 矢量数据库中，并通过结构化输出公开语义搜索、wikilink 图遍历和隐藏连接发现 - 旨在通过自治代理、shell 管道和 LLM 工具使用工作流程直接链接。

附带 AI 代理技能和 OpenCode 代理配置，用于与 OpenCode、Google Antigravity、Pi 代理和 Claude Code 等自主编码代理集成。 此设置经过专门优化，可减少令牌使用和延迟。

Note

嗨，我是尼门德拉。 我每天使用黑曜石作为我的主要笔记解决方案。 当人工智能代理出现时，我想使用我的黑曜石金库作为 RAG 系统。但大多数现有解决方案不能满足我的要求。 在研究时，我发现了这篇文章，它启发了这个项目。所以我构建了这个供我个人使用。 虽然您可以直接使用它，但我强烈建议您根据自己的用例分叉和修改此解决方案。

我不使用 Windows 或 macOS，因此这些版本不会直接发布，但您可以使用源代码编译二进制文件。

特征

  • 语义搜索 — 使用离线全 MiniLM-L6-v2 ONNX 嵌入模型按含义查找笔记，而不仅仅是关键字。
  • 多查询搜索 — 使用多个独立查询进行搜索，以改进复杂主题和 AI 代理工作流程的检索。
  • 知识图谱遍历 - 通过反向链接、多跳连接和共享标签关系探索您的 Obsidian wikilink 图。
  • 隐藏连接 — 通过可选的深度章节级分析，发现未显式链接的语义相关注释。
  • 图提升排名——通过将语义相似性与图关系相结合来提高搜索相关性。
  • 交互式终端 UI — 使用模糊搜索界面浏览结果，并在搜索未返回匹配项时提供智能指导。
  • 高级过滤 - 按部分、标签、代码块、任务和其他注释元数据优化结果。
  • 完整笔记检索——根据索引内容按需重建完整笔记。
  • 结构化输出 - 将结果导出为 JSON 或 TSV，并使用内置 JSONPath 查询轻松实现自动化。
  • AI 代理集成 — 包括内置的 AI 代理技能，专用于自主知识检索。
  • 终端超链接 — 使用 OSC 8 超链接直接从支持的终端打开笔记。
  • 编辑器集成 - 在您喜欢的编辑器中或直接在 Obsidian 中立即打开搜索结果。
  • 黑曜石感知索引 - 尊重您的黑曜石配置，包括忽略的文件、附件文件夹以及可选的空注释引用排除。
注意：目前该工具仅专注于 Markdown 文本，不支持 PDF 或图像 OCR。

引擎盖下

  • Goldmark AST 感知分块 — 按标题层次结构而不是任意字符偏移量拆分 markdown，严格保留列表、GFM 表、块引用/标注和代码块。
  • 嵌入式 ChromaDB — 通过 chroma-go 将矢量直接存储在磁盘上。
  • 增量摄取 — SHA-256 内容哈希在重新运行时以毫秒为单位跳过未修改的注释。
有关更多详细信息，请参阅架构指南。

先决条件

  • Go 1.26.4+
  • 支持 CGO 的工具链
  • Linux（macOS 和 Windows 二进制文件未经测试）

安装

从 GitHub Releases 页面下载预构建的二进制文件，或从源代码构建：

git clone https://github.com/nmdra/notebrain-cli.git
cd notebrain-cli
make build          # CGO_ENABLED=1 go build -o notebrain .
sudo mv notebrain /usr/local/bin/

有关详细信息，请参阅完整的安装指南。

快速入门

1. 为您的金库建立索引：

notebrain ingest --vault-path "/path/to/your/Obsidian Vault"
注意：首次索引可能需要几分钟时间，具体取决于您的保管库大小。

2. 按含义搜索您的笔记：

notebrain search "how do message brokers work?" --limit 5 --top-k 2

3. 发现笔记部分之间深层隐藏的联系：

使用 --deep chunk-by-chunk 部分匹配（§ <Heading>）查找共享相似概念而无需直接 wiki 链接的注释：

notebrain hidden "TLS" --deep

4. 获取脚本和 AI 代理的结构化输出：

notebrain search "how do message brokers work?" --limit 2 --top-k 1 --format=json | jq
Example JSON output

5. 检索完整笔记的连锁命令：

# Extract slug from top search result
SLUG=$(notebrain search "message broker" --limit 1 --jsonpath="$.results[0].note_slug")

# Retrieve complete reconstructed note text
notebrain get "$SLUG" --jsonpath="$.text"

6. 使用 cron 作业或 systemd 计时器自动建立索引，使您的索引保持最新（请参阅计划摄取）。

7. 与人工智能代理集成

使用内置的 AI 代理技能和 OpenCode 代理配置进行知识检索。

Tip

我强烈建议使用具有所提供技能的 Pi Agent。 即使使用 DeepSeek Flash 等低成本模型，它也能提供更高质量的结果，而不会消耗不必要的代币。 它还提高了缓存命中率，有助于降低总体成本。

对于LLM模型，使用默认或中等思维模式以获得快速响应。

配置

NoteBrain 从 ~/.notebrain/config/config.toml 处的 TOML 文件读取配置（或传递 --config=/path/to/config.toml）。 CLI 标志始终覆盖 TOML 值。

复制模板以开始：

mkdir -p ~/.notebrain/config
cp config.example.toml ~/.notebrain/config/config.toml

关键设置（完整参考）：

vault-path = "/path/to/Second-Brain"
vault-name = "Second-Brain"
format     = "text"              # "text", "json", "tsv", "ndjson"

skip-attachments = true          # ignore image/file links in graph
skip-phantom     = true          # exclude uncreated "phantom" notes
respect-exclude  = true          # honor Obsidian's ignore rules

数据位置

所有持久数据都存储在 ~/.notebrain/ 下：

Path 内容
〜/.notebrain/色度/ ChromaDB 矢量存储（嵌入、元数据、链接图）
〜/.notebrain/config/config.toml 用户配置文件

要完全卸载，请删除 notebrain 二进制文件并删除 ~/.notebrain/。
